esp8266_httpupdate_set_led_pin.message0: Set update LED pin %1 LED light level %2
esp8266_httpupdate_set_led_pin.tooltip: Set LED indicator pin during update process

esp8266_httpupdate_set_md5.message0: Set and update MD5 check value %1
esp8266_httpupdate_set_md5.tooltip: Set the MD5 check value of the firmware file

esp8266_httpupdate_set_auth.tooltip: Set username and password for HTTP basic authentication

esp8266_httpupdate_update.tooltip: Download and update firmware from specified URL

esp8266_httpupdate_update_spiffs.tooltip: Download and update the SPIFFS file system from the specified URL

esp8266_httpupdate_on_start.tooltip: Set the callback function when the update starts

esp8266_httpupdate_on_end.tooltip: Set the callback function when the update ends

esp8266_httpupdate_on_progress.tooltip: Set the callback function when the update progress changes

esp8266_httpupdate_on_error.message0: Executed when an update error occurs
esp8266_httpupdate_on_error.tooltip: Set the callback function when an update error occurs

esp8266_httpupdate_get_last_error.tooltip: Get the last updated error code

esp8266_httpupdate_get_last_error_string.tooltip: Get the last updated error message string

esp8266_httpupdate_process_current.tooltip: Get the size (in bytes) of the update file that has been downloaded and written so far

esp8266_httpupdate_process_total.tooltip: Get the total size of the updated files (bytes)
